name: @bettercallclaude/ollama
description: MCP server for local LLM processing via Ollama - Swiss legal privacy protection

scripts.build:bundle: esbuild src/index.ts --bundle --platform=node --target=node20 --format=esm --outfile=dist/index.js --banner:js="import { createRequire } from 'module'; const require = createRequire(import.meta.url);" --sourcemap=inline --minify-syntax --log-level=warning
